channel.title: ND on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in ND on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Bowman County Sheriff’s Office (ND)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Bowman County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: TFM Signed: December 2, 2025 County: Bowman County State: ND FIPS: 38011

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.
